feature: Phase 3: IncrementalSignalRunner with signal scope registry and IncrementalResult
evidence: 26 new tests in tests/test_incremental.py (total 39): TestSignalScopeRegistry (5) verifies all 22 signals have valid incremental_scope and expected distribution (14 file_local, 4 cross_file, 4 git_dependent). TestDirectionForDelta (7) covers improving/degrading/stable thresholds and boundary. TestFindingKey (5) covers deterministic identity, different inputs, None file_path. TestIncrementalResult (2) covers construction and mixed confidence map. TestIncrementalSignalRunner (7) covers empty run, expired baseline, exact/estimated confidence, cross-file carry-forward, new/resolved finding detection, delta/direction. Full regression suite: 1262 passed, 2 skipped.

signal_scope_registry.impact: Added incremental_scope ClassVar to BaseSignal with Literal type (file_local/cross_file/git_dependent). All 22 signal classes annotated: 14 file_local, 4 cross_file (default), 4 git_dependent.

incremental_result.impact: New IncrementalResult dataclass with score, delta, direction, new/resolved findings, per-signal confidence map (exact/estimated), and baseline validity.

incremental_signal_runner.impact: New IncrementalSignalRunner class that runs file-local signals on changed files with exact confidence and carries forward cross-file/git findings with estimated confidence. Includes _direction_for_delta helper (0.005 threshold) and _finding_key for deterministic finding identity.

signal_annotations.impact: 14 signals annotated as file_local, 4 as git_dependent. 4 cross_file signals use the default.

test_coverage.impact: 26 new Phase 3 tests (39 total) covering signal scope registry, helpers, result dataclass, and IncrementalSignalRunner integration.
